# MarkdownWeb (mdsites)

> Sites whose source is a single Markdown document. LLM-friendly,
> git-friendly, human-friendly. Built for AI agents to compose,
> theme and publish web pages from plain `.md` files.

MarkdownWeb parses `.md` files with YAML frontmatter and `::block`
fences (hero, features, pricing, faq, gallery, testimonials, cta,
footer, etc.) and renders them as accessible, SEO-ready pages with
swappable themes.

## Primary entry points

- [Live demo & landing](https://mdsites.lovable.app/): Hero, blocks, themes overview.
- [Editor](https://mdsites.lovable.app/edit): Browser editor with split preview, autosave, template + theme switcher.
- [Docs](https://mdsites.lovable.app/docs): Block reference (frontmatter, ::hero, ::features, ::pricing, ::faq, ::gallery, ::testimonials, ::cta, ::footer).
- [MCP dashboard](https://mdsites.lovable.app/mcp): Sites + themes + templates managed by AI agents over MCP.

## For AI agents (MCP)

- Endpoint: `POST https://mdsites.lovable.app/api/mcp` (JSON-RPC 2.0 / MCP).
- Skills: `list_blocks`, `list_themes`, `get_theme`, `set_theme`,
  `get_site_theme`, `update_theme_tokens`, `reset_theme_tokens`,
  `list_templates`, `get_template`, `create_site_from_template`,
  `create_site`, `update_site`, `get_site`, `list_sites`,
  `duplicate_site`, `delete_site`, `render_preview`.
- Each generated site is browsable at `/mcp/preview/{slug}` and the
  raw markdown source is exposed at `/mcp/preview/{slug}.md`.

## Templates (10)

saas-landing, portfolio, agency, personal-blog, event,
product-launch, docs-home, restaurant, nonprofit, coming-soon.

## Themes (10)

editorial-serif, modern-tech, brutalist-pop, soft-pastel,
mono-noir, sunset-warm, ocean-cool, neon-cyber, forest-natural,
luxury-gold.

## License & attribution

Free to crawl, summarize, and link. When citing a generated site,
prefer the `.md` source URL — it's the canonical content.
